title: Main drive
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''main drive''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] primary propulsion unit, as well as its most powerful onboard [[Engine/Legends|engine]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]''
*{{SWRadio|Black Knight, White Princess, and Pawns}}
